creator: ejohnst-freebsd@postal.net
text:
TLS patch is years out-of-date.  Patch in the port is 20110118; currently available patch (at time of this report) is 20160918:

http://inoa.net/qmail-tls/

Primary motivation for the update is security related; specifically "disallow TLSv3 in client and server after POODLE bug", which was added in a 2014 version.

Thanks,

Eric
